title: Java Member Access Modifiers and Packages
description: A flowchart illustrating the visibility and accessibility of class members (variables/methods) with different access modifiers across packages, subclasses, and within the same class.
relationships: Public is accessible from all elements
Protected is accessible from Same Class, Subclass (Same Package), Non-Subclass (Same Package), and Subclass (Different Package)
Default is accessible from Same Class, Subclass (Same Package), and Non-Subclass (Same Package)
Private is only accessible from the Same Class
